results.title: Checkmate
results.description: Checkmate is an open-source, self-hosted application for real-time uptime and infrastructure monitoring, tracking server hardware, response times, and incidents with detailed visualizations and alerts.

results.title: Checkmate
results.description: Checkmate provides fast and versatile argument checks for R functions, offering informative error messages and performance optimizations with C extensions, and extending testthat for unit tests.

results.title: Checkmk
results.description: Checkmk is a comprehensive IT infrastructure monitoring software. It provides specialized solutions for system monitoring, configuration, administration, data analysis, and automation across diverse environments, including servers, cloud, containers, and network services.

results.title: Checkmk
results.description: Checkmk is a comprehensive IT monitoring solution for physical, virtual, containerized, and cloud environments, offering scalability, flexibility, and low resource consumption.

results.title: Checkmk
results.description: Checkmk is a comprehensive IT monitoring software designed to manage and oversee diverse IT infrastructures, offering features for system configuration, administration, performance analysis, and automation, including synthetic monitoring.

results.title: Checkly (llmstxt)
results.description: Checkly is a synthetic monitoring platform for developers and DevOps, offering API and browser monitoring, monitoring as code, and CI/CD integration.

results.title: Checkly (llmstxt)
results.description: Checkly is a synthetic monitoring platform for developers and DevOps, offering API and browser monitoring with Playwright, and monitoring as code workflows.

results.title: Uptime Monitor
results.description: A uptime monitoring service that is easy and cheap to run at scale. Create endpoint checks for uptime, latency, and status code. Supports OpsGenie for alerts.

results.title: Sigstore Probers
results.description: Sigstore Probers provides monitoring tools for Sigstore's staging and production environments, alerting on-call personnel if any prober fails.

results.title: ConSol Monitoring
results.description: ConSol Monitoring (OMD) is a comprehensive IT infrastructure monitoring solution offering a wide range of checks, plugins, and integrations for various technologies.

results.title: Inspector (llmstxt)
results.description: Inspector is a code execution monitoring tool that provides real-time insights, alerts, and AI-powered bug fixing for various PHP frameworks and applications.

results.title: System Monitoring
results.description: A lightweight Node.js library for real-time system monitoring that tracks CPU, memory, disk usage, network I/O, and provides Express middleware for exposing system metrics.

results.title: OpenZeppelin Monitor
results.description: A blockchain monitoring service that watches for specific on-chain activities and triggers notifications based on configurable conditions.

results.title: System Monitoring
results.description: A lightweight and efficient Node.js library and package for real-time system monitoring, tracking metrics like CPU, memory, disk usage, network I/O, uptime, and temperature, and providing Express middleware for exposing these metrics.

results.title: CDK Monitoring Constructs
results.description: Easy-to-use CDK constructs for monitoring AWS infrastructure with Amazon CloudWatch, offering predefined alarms, concise dashboards, and extensibility.

results.title: EHentai Prometheus Metrics Collector
results.description: This software periodically checks specified e-hentai pages and extracts metrics compatible with Prometheus for monitoring.

results.title: 360 Monitoring
results.description: 360 Monitoring is a service that provides comprehensive monitoring for servers and websites, offering detailed metrics, alerts, and a wide array of plugins for various services like Apache, MySQL, and NGiNX.

results.title: Pulse
results.description: Pulse is a real-time monitoring dashboard for Proxmox VE, Proxmox Mail Gateway, PBS, and Docker infrastructure with intelligent alerts and webhook support.

results.title: Watchtower
results.description: Watchtower automates Docker container image updates by monitoring registries for new images, then pulling and restarting the corresponding containers.

results.title: Cloud Monitoring
results.description: Cloud Monitoring (Google Cloud) provides observability for cloud and hybrid environments by collecting, analyzing, and visualizing metrics, logs, and traces; it includes agents, managed Prometheus, SLO monitoring, alerting, dashboards, and OpenTelemetry support.

results.title: Phare (llmstxt)
results.description: Phare is a platform for monitoring website and API uptime, with features for creating alert rules, managing incidents, and integrating with various communication channels like Discord, Slack, and SMS.

results.title: Nightscout CGM Remote Monitor
results.description: A web-based system for remotely viewing a patient's Continuous Glucose Monitor (CGM) data in real-time, with graphical display, prediction, and alarms.

results.title: OverSight
results.description: OverSight monitors a Mac's microphone and webcam, alerting users when the internal mic is activated or when processes access the webcam to prevent unauthorized surveillance.

results.title: Vibe Check MCP
results.description: Vibe Check MCP is a plug-and-play AI meta-mentor that uses Chain-Pattern Interrupts (CPI) to provide oversight for LLM agents, keeping them on the minimal viable path, preventing over-engineering, and ensuring alignment, reflection, and safety.

results.title: Prometheus
results.description: Prometheus is a systems and service monitoring system that collects metrics, evaluates rules, displays results, and triggers alerts.

results.title: Uptime Watcher
results.description: Uptime Watcher is a project designed to monitor the operational status and availability of services, with documentation detailing its architecture, data management, and visualization components.

results.title: Durable Functions Monitor
results.description: A monitoring, debugging, and management UI tool for Azure Durable Functions that provides visibility into orchestration instances across multiple deployment options.

results.title: SOFA Lookout
results.description: SOFALookout is a project that measures and monitors target systems using multi-dimensional metrics, referencing the Metrics2.0 standard, and supports integration with mainstream collection agents.

results.title: Uptime Watcher
results.description: Uptime Watcher: Electron desktop app for monitoring websites, APIs, servers, and network services with real-time updates, response analytics, historical data visualization, and no cloud dependency.
